notes: Faithful manifest of the 9 Gherkin scenarios across the 5 clusters. All scenarios are correctness contracts (no lockdown), each backed by a live-stack integration test that honest-skips without docker and runs fully on a docker host (C2/C3a/C3b assert against the live stack; C1/C4 honest-skip the host-docker / real-geocoder path on the containerized runner). regressionRequired=true means the linked test is the persistent regression guard for that contract.

scenarios.scope: Scope 1: C1 CLI auth passthrough (docker-absent runner) honest skip
scenarios.title: auth with no subcommand returns exit 2 + usage banner

scenarios.scope: Scope 1: C1 CLI auth passthrough (docker-absent runner) honest skip
scenarios.title: auth unknown subcommand returns exit 2 + forwarded arg

scenarios.scope: Scope 2: C2 transport-hint in-container URL unreachability
scenarios.title: web and mobile hints accepted as telemetry against a healthy stack

scenarios.scope: Scope 2: C2 transport-hint in-container URL unreachability
scenarios.title: unknown transport_hint rejected pre-facade

scenarios.scope: Scope 2: C2 transport-hint in-container URL unreachability
scenarios.title: readiness determination (local vs CI)

scenarios.scope: Scope 3: C3a micro-tools registry canary stale assertion
scenarios.title: import-registered micro-tools match shipped reality

scenarios.scope: Scope 4: C3b weather scenario allowed_tools location_normalize
scenarios.title: weather allowed_tools includes location_normalize and weather_lookup

scenarios.scope: Scope 5: C4 TestLocationNormalizeIntegration fallback-geocoder honest skip
scenarios.title: fallback geocoder is detected and the test honestly skips

scenarios.scope: Scope 5: C4 TestLocationNormalizeIntegration fallback-geocoder honest skip
scenarios.title: a real open-meteo geocoder still exercises the assertions
